issues.title: #1: Not thread-safe
issues.invariant: Shared function attributes must not be mutated by concurrent threads without synchronization

issues.title: #2: Loses retry context
issues.invariant: Context manager __enter__ must return retry_state to expose retry context to callers

issues.title: #3: Concurrent iterations corrupt state
issues.invariant: Each Retrying instance must maintain isolated thread-local state; copies must not share statistics references across concurrent execution contexts

issues.title: #4: Returns None prematurely
issues.invariant: When retry is not needed, the method must return the actual result immediately instead of returning None with a deferred unconsumed action

issues.title: #6: statistics attribute is non-atomic
issues.invariant: The statistics property must initialize atomically without a TOCTOU check-then-use race condition.

issues.title: #7: Suppresses exceptions silently
issues.invariant: Exception must be raised after stop condition even when retry_error_callback is set, preventing silent suppression

issues.title: #8: Clears outcome while actions reference it
issues.invariant: Action references must be cleared before clearing data they reference

issues.title: #9: Sets upcoming_sleep to None
issues.invariant: upcoming_sleep must never be None; it must be a numeric value (defaulting to 0.0 if the wait function returns None).

issues.title: #10: Return values are ignored
issues.invariant: Functions that construct action objects must return them instead of implicitly returning None.

issues.title: #11: Closures might capture stale state
issues.invariant: Closures must capture references at creation time via default arguments, not at execution time, to prevent stale state access.

issues.title: #12: retry=None causes AttributeError
issues.invariant: Callable must not be invoked without None-checking

issues.title: #13: No type validation
issues.invariant: Type validation must occur before subscript access to prevent AttributeError or IndexError on exc_info
